name: Filer
description_short: Filer Credit Union is a member-focused, community-based credit union offering savings accounts, checking, auto loans, home loans, and credit cards to individuals and businesses.
description_long:
Filer Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving individuals and businesses in their community. Based on their website messaging, the organization positions itself around financial wellness through community relationships and education, serving members from childhood savings accounts through major life milestones like home purchases and business creation.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of personal financial products including multiple savings account types (Regular Share Savings, Loyalty Savings, Money Market Accounts, Certificates, IRAs, Christmas Club, and Save 2 Win), various checking accounts (Share Draft Checking, Loyalty Checking, Teen Saver Checking), and credit products (auto loans, home loans, HELOCs, personal loans, and Visa credit cards with rewards options). They also serve businesses with dedicated business checking, savings, lending, and merchant services. Additional features include HSAs, shared branching network access, Zelle integration, and financial calculators.

Filer differentiates itself through explicit emphasis on community-based relationships and member education as core values. They offer specialized products like recreational vehicle and other secured loans, teen savings accounts, and business-focused services. The credit union provides multiple access points including online banking with MFA security, shared branching, and ATM networks. They actively engage in community initiatives including scholarships and member newsletters.

As a credit union, Filer benefits from not-for-profit status and member ownership structure, which typically translates to competitive rates and lower fees than traditional banks. However, the website provided limited specific rate information, fee schedules, or detailed product terms. The organization appears stable and established with clear membership eligibility requirements and compliance with NCUA insurance standards.
services: Visa credit cards with rewards programs
pros: Member-owned credit union structure typically offers more competitive rates and lower fees than for-profit banks
Comprehensive product suite covering savings, checking, lending, and business services under one institution
Offers specialized accounts like Teen Saver Checking and Save 2 Win programs for financial education
Access to shared branching network and ATM partnerships beyond their physical locations
Visa rewards credit cards available to members
Business lending and merchant services available for small business members
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) security update for online banking as of October 2025
cons: Website does not display specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules, requiring members to contact directly for pricing
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements or geographic service area
No details provided about loan approval timelines, minimum/maximum loan amounts, or underwriting criteria
best_for: Community members seeking relationship-based banking with emphasis on financial education
Small business owners needing comprehensive business checking, lending, and merchant services
Families wanting specialized youth banking products like teen savings and checking accounts
Members prioritizing competitive rates through not-for-profit credit union structure
diagnosis: Filer Credit Union is best for community members and small business owners seeking competitive rates and personalized service through a not-for-profit member-owned institution. The main caveat is that specific rates, fees, and product terms are not published on their website, requiring direct member contact to evaluate pricing competitiveness against other lenders.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Filer — Credit Union in Manistee, MI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Filer — NCUA-insured credit union in Manistee, MI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
